title: Geometry Craft
description: Geometry Craft adds a ton of new blocks and items with special ability's
body:
### **GEOMETRY CRAFT**



This mod adds stuff from Geometry Dash



Mod Includes:
Basic GD Blocks 
Basic GD Spikes
Cube and Ship Gamemodes
All Jump Orbs and Pads, (Pink, Yellow, Red)
Gravity Orb and Pad (Blue)
Dash Orb and Gravity Dash Orb (Green, Pink)
Black Orb
Mana Orbs and Shards
Demon Keys with Vault of Secrets



*This is not every addition, just a quick summary, also you can use JEI (Just Enough Items) for crafting recipes.*
